  "findings": [
    "Pre-task photos show planned guards and access control in place, but actual bonding conductor connections cannot be verified from briefing form alone.",
    "No active exposure is visible, but in-progress equipment bonding requires visual confirmation of bonding jumper sizing, material, and secure attachment per NEC 250.104 and 250.30."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Physically inspect and test bonding connections for continuity, correct conductor size, and proper attachment before work continues.",
    "Confirm that bonding jumpers comply with NEC 250.104 for metal piping systems and 250.30 for separately derived systems where applicable."
  ],
  "rationale": "The description relies on pre-task documentation without in-the-field verification of the bonding installation. NEC requires bonds to be made effectively and visibly, not just planned. In-progress status means bonding work has begun but cannot be signed off without direct observation or test data.",
  "references": [
    "NEC 250.104",
    "NEC 250.30"
  ]
}
